# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID'
      allow_failure: true

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying application..."
  only:
    - merge_requests
  variables:
    DEPLOY_TAG: "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
  notifications:
    email:
      recipients:
        - your-email@example.com
      subject: "Deployment Notification for Merge Request #${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
      template: custom_template
      when: on_success
